examples: Abdul Hussein has a speed edge over Cody Gibson on the feet due to his Southpaw stance and kickboxing game.
Abdul Hussein hits significantly hard for being 5'5 and small for 135 pounds.
Abdul Hussein gives up some height and reach.
Abdul Hussein can be countered because of the risks he takes while fighting in close.
Cody Gibson is way bigger than Abdul Hussein and has a lot of UFC experience.
Cody Gibson is 38 years old and in the final phase of his career.
Cody Gibson is likely on his way out of the UFC with a loss in this fight.
Abdul Hussein knocked out Tyson Nam in his last fight outside of the UFC.
Abdul Hussein is 15-2 in professional MMA.
Abdul Hussein lost to Muhammad Mokaev.
Cody Gibson is a very good wrestler who gets multiple takedowns in his wins and pushes a high striking pace.
Cody Gibson has a good wrestling background and is taller with a reach advantage.
Cody Gibson was submitted in the second round by Deon Blackshere.
Cody Gibson lacks the strength at 38 years old to control other bantamweights in the clinch or grappling exchanges.
Sam Patterson holds a five-inch reach advantage and a three-inch height advantage over Santiago Ponzanibio.
Sam Patterson has the ability to stay on the outside and outstrike Santiago Ponzinibio over a 15-minute fight.
Sam Patterson has tall man defense where he keeps his chin up to be hit.
Sam Patterson possesses a bit of defensive liability due to his tall man's defense.
Abdul Hussein has strong and tricky overall grappling skills.
Abdul Hussein had a competitive fight against Muhammad Mokaev earlier in their careers and was able to take Mokaev down.
Abdul Hussein has been outgrappled in a few past fights despite grappling being his main game plan.
Cody Gibson is a decent enough kickboxer with a not bad ground game.
Cody Gibson is a tall lanky guy for the bantamweight division and uses his length well with a good jab and teeps.
Cody Gibson does not necessarily have the finishing ability that he would need here.
Cody Gibson gets backed up to the cage, which takes the sting off his shots and allows opponents to negate his range.
Mike Davis is a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu and a very good wrestler with good striking.
Mike Davis has a 60% takedown defense rate.
Mike Davis pulled guard in the first 10 seconds and gassed out in his fight against Farat Zhalgasbayev.
Ismael Bonfim is a good striker.
Ismael Bonfim has good hands and boxing success when he is fresh.
Ismael Bonfim tends to break when he is pressured or forced to fight on the back foot.
Bogdan Guskov has been in training camp helping Walter Walker get ready.
Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight on about a week and a half to two weeks notice.
Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight against Magomed Ankalaev on short notice in Abu Dhabi over five rounds.
Axel Sola showed great durability against Jones by not caring about his own safety.
Axel Sola went to war with Mason Jones, got hurt, and fought through it to reach the final bell.
Axel Sola was rocked badly in his last fight.
Mike Davis is a good wrestler and good striker with a good gas tank when he is healthy.
Mike Davis has a history of fading or slowing down significantly in the later rounds of his fights.
Steve Erceg is on a two-fight win streak.
Steve Erceg has never broken 100 DraftKings points in three-round fights.
